markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.505 — Emissions-related Inspection Fee

(a) The department by rule may impose an inspection fee for a vehicle inspected under Section 548.301 (Commission to Establish Program) (a) in addition to a fee adopted under Section 382.202 (Vehicle Emissions Inspection and Maintenance Program) , Health and Safety Code. A fee imposed under this subsection must be based on the costs of:

    (1) providing inspections; and

    (2) administering the program.

(b) The department may provide a maximum fee for an inspection under this subchapter. The department may not set a minimum fee for an inspection under this subchapter.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 18, eff. January 1, 2025.*
